Operation 'getAllStatisticsXml' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Current description is too vague about what 'complete statistics' includes. Added specific details about the types of statistics returned (server metrics, zone stats, network traffic, memory, tasks) to help AI agents understand the scope of data. Clarified the backward compatibility context and noted that no parameters are required. This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this endpoint versus JSON alternatives.

data.current_description: Returns complete statistics in XML format for backward compatibility.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive BIND server statistics including server performance metrics, zone statistics, network traffic data, memory usage, and task information in XML format. This endpoint provides the same data as the JSON v1 API but in XML format for backward compatibility with legacy monitoring systems. No parameters required.
data.reasoning: Current description is too vague about what 'complete statistics' includes. Added specific details about the types of statistics returned (server metrics, zone stats, network traffic, memory, tasks) to help AI agents understand the scope of data. Clarified the backward compatibility context and noted that no parameters are required. This improves AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this endpoint versus JSON alternatives.
